signals.headline: Bitcoin Breaks 7-Year 'Uptober' Streak with ~4-5% Monthly Loss Ending October 2025 | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Breaks 7-Year 'Uptober' Streak with ~4-5% Monthly Loss Ending October 2025 | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin ended October 2025 down approximately 4% to around $110,000, marking its first October decline since 2018 and the worst in seven years, despite hitting an all-time high near $124,000 early in the month.[1][2][3]  
A flash crash on October 10 liquidated over $19 billion in positions
matched_markets: Will October be the best month for Bitcoin in 2026?
